title: Learn to Ask Questions — Level 2
tagline: Deeper situations for sharper questions and more thoughtful conversations.
description: More advanced scenarios encourage children to observe closely, consider different perspectives and form meaningful questions. Children respond first and then flip the card for guidance, making each activity engaging and self-checking.
benefits: Develops deeper questioning and critical-thinking skills
Helps children explain ideas and speak with confidence
Builds awareness of values, choices and real-world situations

comparison.focus: Ask better questions and speak with confidence
comparison.format: Double-sided laminated cards with rounded corners

themesIncluded: Nature and environment, community helpers, healthy habits, festivals, problem-solving, values and character.
